## Source: ghsa-malware (6681f44b61cb98421bc1753511b0ae66ab4b484b6778171da794a03a7cedf68e)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (2e04df4c0bb1f91ce34ee36e4731ee580ff1e7a1131cafd97a660d90f4c4cfb1)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'gitlab-glfm-markdown' @ 7.0.1 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:
- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

It is considered malicious because:

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
